---
title: Quant Research
date: 2026-06-10
comments: false
sitemap: false
---

<meta name="robots" content="noindex,nofollow,noarchive">

<div class="quant-lock" id="quant-lock">
  <div class="quant-lock-panel">
    <h1>Quant Research</h1>
    <p class="quant-muted">Private notes are encrypted in this static page. Enter the password to decrypt them locally in your browser.</p>
    <form id="quant-form" class="quant-form">
      <label for="quant-password">Password</label>
      <div class="quant-input-row">
        <input id="quant-password" type="password" autocomplete="current-password" autofocus>
        <button type="submit">Unlock</button>
      </div>
      <label class="quant-remember">
        <input id="quant-remember" type="checkbox">
        Remember this device for 30 days
      </label>
      <p id="quant-error" class="quant-error" role="alert"></p>
    </form>
  </div>
</div>

<article id="quant-content" class="quant-content" hidden></article>

<script id="quant-payload" type="application/json">
{
  "kdf": "PBKDF2-SHA256",
  "iterations": 250000,
  "salt": "GiPNpnDk4GN6tC38giYeVA==",
  "iv": "XLtzLd4DDQnXEHEm",
  "tag": "PekViVPdD1PF9BjX/9w0hw==",
  "ciphertext": ""
}
</script>
<script src="/js/quant-unlock.js"></script>
